Shotgrid Integration

Via this page you can trigger certain events that will interact with Shotgird and gather some stats about the integration.

Prepare '' Project on Shotgrid

Ensure all the required data is present in both Shotgrid and Ayon, greyed out fields means they are not really set on Shotgrid, use Create attributes below to fix that.

Perform a full Sync

Compare the Shotgrid Project with the Ayon one, and backfill any missing data.
